Describe the sequence of objects held by the presenter and key visual elements from start to finish.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a blue logo for R.C. Worst appears; at 6s, a man in a black polo holds a grey cylinder near a green pump; at 12s, text overlay introduces Foot Valves Explained; at 14s, the man displays a brass foot valve component; at 18s, he holds a container with brown liquid.

question: Outline the visible equipment and text overlays as they appear throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the R.C. Worst logo animation plays with lens flares; at 6s, a grey filter housing labeled INLINE400 becomes visible; at 12s, a green cutaway pump model is shown on a black base; at 14s, pressure gauges appear above the filter housing; at 18s, brass plumbing fittings are displayed on a green table.
